items.title: Cam Skattebo doesn't care if people think he's "brain-dead"
items.summary: Giants running back Cam Skattebo attempted to show that his ankle is healed by attempting to perform a backflip on Saturday at Fanatics Fest.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Donald Trump and Gianni Infantino booed before US president attempts to crash Spain celebrations

items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Chapman, Santner star in low-scoring thriller as NZ take series
items.summary: The visitors just about held their nerve in a chase of 189 to take an unassailable 3-1 lead in the ODI series
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
